description: This Kotlin source file defines an Android activity named DiagnosticActivity used for displaying startup diagnostics information, such as crash markers and initialization failures, and allows the user to clear crash markers or proceed to the main application.

classes.name: DiagnosticActivity
classes.description: An Android Activity class responsible for displaying startup diagnostics information, including crash markers and initialization status, without using XML layouts.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes the activity UI components, reads crash markers and init failure messages, and displays them along with control buttons for user interaction.

methods.name: spaceDp
methods.description: Creates a spacer TextView with specified height in density-independent pixels to add vertical spacing in the layout.
